Tools  ›  list_rooms

list_rooms

context on demand

List all rooms in the model with name, number, level, area.

Parameters

NameTypeRequiredDescription
level string no Filter by level name
nameContains string no Filter rooms by name containing text

Returns

Array of rooms objects.
Each row carries id, name, and the key properties of a room.
Empty array when no rooms match the filter.

Example prompts

  • Corridor section
  • Cross section
  • Corridor view

Keywords

corridor section · cross section · corridor view
